title: BankPlus
description: Banking System for Private RP Servers
body:
🌐 **BankPlusAR** — Lightweight Roleplay Banking Plugin

**BankPlusAR is a clean and minimalistic economy plugin built for vanilla-style survival and private servers. Designed with immersion in mind, it introduces a simple but effective AR-based banking system, using diamond ores as in-game currency. No confusing menus, no bloat — just straight-up mining, earning, and transferring.**

**💡 Features:**
> 💰 Bank account per player with customizable maximum balance
> 
> 🪨 Deposit/withdraw diamond ores (supports regular & deepslate)
> 
> 🔁 Transfer money to other players with a configurable fee
> 
> 🧾 Transaction history stored per player, viewable anytime
> 
> 📛 Real player names stored alongside UUIDs for clarity
> 
> 📄 Fully editable messages.yml with multilingual support
> 
> 🚫 No GUI — perfect for roleplay or terminal-style gameplay
> 
> 📦 Lightweight and compatible with PaperMC 1.19 to 1.21.7

**🎯 Ideal for:**

🛡️ Vanilla & private SMP servers

🧙 Roleplay-style survival with passports, IDs, jobs

👨‍👩‍👧 Cozy community worlds and family realms

🎮 Admins who prefer clear commands over clunky menus

**This is my first plugin, made with love and care.
More updates and companion plugins are coming soon under the PlusPlug collection!**
